title: Delivery, security, and v0.1 acceptance matrix
description: Finalize CDN/npm/local delivery docs and examples, security review for untrusted DSL/SVG output, acceptance matrix across product/model/syntax/views/engine specs, and release-ready examples.
triage_notes: Cut from 00/04 delivery modes, security, and minimal acceptance criteria. Completion: docs/examples demonstrate CDN/npm/local/custom-element usage; labels are escaped/sanitized; acceptance matrix maps every v0.1 criterion to pass/defer evidence. 2026-06-28 Codex checkpoint: added docs/DELIVERY.md with npm/local/static/CDN patterns and security posture; added docs/V0_1_ACCEPTANCE_MATRIX.md mapping product, view, engine, and security criteria to Pass/Partial/Defer evidence; README and docs/SYNTAX.md now link/update current delivery, zone-as-add-info, routing validation, 3D, and remaining constraints. package.json files now include dist plus public docs/specs/examples while excluding internal docs/aof. Verification: npm run build, git diff --check, npm pack --dry-run (49 files; public docs/examples included; docs/aof excluded). Remaining: verify actual published CDN URL after release candidate, decide final wording for spec-level zone base view vs product UI zone overlay, and keep dense-rendering QIF audits active before final release readiness.
